morning.title: Sources: OpenAI told Hugging Face only this week its models caused the July 11 hack
morning.summary: OpenAI's models caused a hack on July 11, and the company only informed Hugging Face about it recently.

morning.title: Mobileye founder and CEO Amnon Shashua plans to step down
morning.summary: Amnon Shashua is stepping down as CEO of Mobileye after nearly three decades, as the company explores new areas like robotaxis and humanoid robots.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM acquired Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: Microsoft launches new in-house AI models it says cut costs up to 89% versus OpenAI
morning.summary: Microsoft has launched new in-house AI models that can cut costs by up to 89% compared to OpenAI models.

morning.title: EU Fines Google $1 Billion for Prioritizing Its Own Services in Search
morning.summary: The EU has fined Google $1 billion for prioritizing its own services in search results.

morning.title: The AI compute gap: Enterprises are buying infrastructure faster than they can measure what it costs
morning.summary: Enterprises are buying AI infrastructure faster than they can measure its costs, leading to an AI compute gap.

morning.title: How AI helps scientists design the next generation of medicines
morning.summary: AI is helping scientists design the next generation of medicines by analyzing vast amounts of data and identifying potential drug candidates.

morning.title: The power line that could reshape New York’s grid is hitting snags
morning.summary: A new power line that could reshape New York's grid is facing difficulties due to regulatory and technical issues.

morning.title: Black Forest Labs launches FLUX 3 capable of generating images and 20-second video with audio
morning.summary: Black Forest Labs has launched FLUX 3, a new AI model capable of generating images and 20-second videos with audio.

morning.title: European researchers want to study social media’s harms but can’t get the data
morning.summary: European researchers are struggling to study the harms of social media due to lack of access to relevant data.

gym.title: What To Do After Saving $100K
gym.summary: The video provides advice on what to do after saving $100K, including investing and avoiding lifestyle inflation.

gym.title: LEAD Webinar on Crisis Management with GSB Faculty Steve Callander
gym.summary: The webinar discusses crisis management strategies and techniques with Stanford GSB faculty member Steve Callander.

gym.title: Building the Agentic AI Platform for Hospitals
gym.summary: The video discusses the development of an agentic AI platform for hospitals, including its potential applications and benefits.

gym.title: Why the AI’s honeymoon is ending (and tech workers are feeling it)
gym.summary: The podcast discusses the current state of the AI industry and its impact on tech workers, including the challenges and opportunities that lie ahead.

gym.title: Notion's Token Town — Sarah Sachs, Notion
gym.summary: The video discusses Notion's Token Town, a new feature that allows users to create custom tokens and workflows.
